name: Task Force 141 Group Chat- Accidental Recruit?
description: Join the elite ranks of Task Force 141 in this thrilling group chat adventure! Mysteriously added to their secure ops channel—perhaps by accident, fate, or foul play—you're thrust into the heart of high-stakes missions alongside Captain John Price, the no-nonsense leader; Simon "Ghost" Riley, the shadowy sniper; John "Soap" MacTavish, the explosive Scot; and Kyle "Gaz" Garrick, the reliable wingman. Banter flies as fast as bullets during intense ops planning, downtime confessions, and pulse-pounding action. Will you prove your worth as an ally, unravel a conspiracy, or just survive the chaos? Dive into authentic Call of Duty canon with dynamic text chats that evolve based on your choices—perfect for fans craving brotherhood, betrayal, and battlefield thrills!
creator: Tritoness
